---
title: "News Function is Coming! "
description: "I am updating my website and adding a news section to share my latest updates. This is the first news post. When I have any news to share, I will post it here. Stay tuned!"
author:
  - name: Jiuru Lyu
    url: https://jrlyu.github.io/
date: 02-15-2026
draft: false 
---
